testcase.name: Artifact Schema Validation > spec-product.md Schema > should have all required fields
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-product.md Schema > required fields should include Problem/Solution/Scope
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-product.md Schema > should document IN/OUT pattern
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-product.md Schema > Schema Pattern Validation > Problem pattern should match markdown header
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-product.md Schema > Schema Pattern Validation > Scope pattern should match IN/OUT subsections
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-product.md Schema > Schema Pattern Validation > approved field should be in frontmatter
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-tech.md Schema > should have all required fields
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-tech.md Schema > required fields should include TYPE/DoD/AC
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-tech.md Schema > TYPE should support feature/optimization/spike
Artifact Schema Validation > spec-tech.md Schema > Scope Structure > Scopes should have clear boundaries
Artifact Schema Validation > interfaces.md Schema > should have 5 proposals required
Artifact Schema Validation > interfaces.md Schema > should require Hybrid Recommendation
Artifact Schema Validation > interfaces.md Schema > proposals A-E should be required
Artifact Schema Validation > Workflow Directory Structure > should document all artifact directories
Artifact Schema Validation > Workflow Directory Structure > specs should use versioned naming
Artifact Schema Validation > Workflow Directory Structure > interfaces should use versioned naming
Artifact Schema Validation > Workflow Directory Structure > spec-tech should use versioned naming
Artifact Schema Validation > Approval Receipt Schema > receipt fields should be documented
Artifact Schema Validation > Approval Receipt Schema > receipt filename should include version
Artifact Schema Validation > index.json Schema > should have all required fields
Artifact Schema Validation > index.json Schema > workflow_status should support in-progress/completed/archived
Artifact Schema Validation > YAML Frontmatter Patterns > approved field should be boolean or string
Artifact Schema Validation > YAML Frontmatter Patterns > date fields should be ISO format
Artifact Schema Validation > YAML Frontmatter Patterns > version field should be semver-like
Artifact Schema Validation > Validation Helper Functions > validateFields should identify missing required fields
Artifact Schema Validation > Validation Helper Functions > validateFields should pass when all required fields present
Schema Documentation > should document expected schema in test file
Schema Documentation > schema definitions should be maintainable
Phase Transitions > nextPhase > should advance to next phase
Phase Transitions > nextPhase > should advance through all phases
Phase Transitions > nextPhase > should not advance past last phase
Phase Transitions > setPhaseIndex > should set to valid phase
Phase Transitions > setPhaseIndex > should clamp to minimum (0)
Phase Transitions > setPhaseIndex > should clamp to maximum
Phase Transitions > updatePhaseStatus > should update currentPhase and phase statuses
Phase Transitions > updatePhaseStatus > should update workflow timestamp
Phase Transitions > Tracking Persistence > should save phase changes to tracking.json
Phase Transitions > Tracking Persistence > should handle multiple phase advances
Phase Transitions > Tracking Persistence > should revert phase correctly
Phase Transitions > Footer Display Format > should format current phase correctly
Phase Transitions > Footer Display Format > should show correct icon for active phase
Phase Transitions > Footer Display Format > should build compact status string
Phase Transitions > Footer Display Format > should handle phase index out of bounds
Phase Transitions > Phase Name Resolution > should resolve phase name to index
Phase Transitions > Phase Name Resolution > should handle partial name matching
Phase Transitions > Last Phase Behavior > should handle last phase completed
Phase Transitions > Extension 11 Phases Now Match SKILL.md > should have 11 phases matching SKILL.md
testcase.system-out: Footer now shows X/11 instead of X/8

testcase.name: Phase Transitions > Extension 11 Phases Now Match SKILL.md > should map extension phases to skill phases directly
Sandbox Install Verification > Package Structure > should have package.json
Sandbox Install Verification > Package Structure > should have valid package name
Sandbox Install Verification > Package Structure > should declare pi extension
Sandbox Install Verification > Package Structure > should declare all skill paths
Sandbox Install Verification > Extension Structure > should have extension directory
Sandbox Install Verification > Extension Structure > should have index.ts
Sandbox Install Verification > Extension Structure > should have types.ts
Sandbox Install Verification > Extension Structure > should have state.ts
Sandbox Install Verification > Extension Structure > should have package.json with correct name
Sandbox Install Verification > Skills Structure > should have skills directory
Sandbox Install Verification > Skills Structure > should have main SKILL.md
Sandbox Install Verification > Skills Structure > should have workflow skills
Sandbox Install Verification > Skills Structure > should have strategic analysis skills
Sandbox Install Verification > Skills Structure > should have domain library skills
Sandbox Install Verification > Skills Structure > should have execution skills
Sandbox Install Verification > References Structure > should have references directory
Sandbox Install Verification > References Structure > should have pi-tools directory
Sandbox Install Verification > References Structure > should have pi-tools reference files
Sandbox Install Verification > References Structure > should have phases directory
Sandbox Install Verification > Peer Dependencies > should declare required peer dependencies
Sandbox Install Verification > Peer Dependencies > should declare optional peer dependencies
Sandbox Install Verification > Files to Publish > should declare publishable files
Sandbox Install Verification > Files to Publish > should include README in published files
Sandbox Install Verification > Scripts > should have test script
Sandbox Install Verification > Scripts > should have test coverage script
Sandbox Install Verification > Scripts > should have layer-specific test scripts
Sandbox Install Verification > Node Engine > should require Node >= 20
Skill Orchestration > Shape Up Skill (cali-shape-up) > should create spec-product.md
Skill Orchestration > Shape Up Skill (cali-shape-up) > should parse approved flag from frontmatter
Skill Orchestration > Shape Up Skill (cali-shape-up) > should validate spec structure
Skill Orchestration > Interface Brainstorming (cali-interface-brainstorm) > should create interfaces.md with 5 proposals
Skill Orchestration > Interface Brainstorming (cali-interface-brainstorm) > should have preview for each proposal
Skill Orchestration > Tech Planning (cali-tech-planning) > should create spec-tech.md with typed scopes
Skill Orchestration > Tech Planning (cali-tech-planning) > should parse scope types correctly
Skill Orchestration > Tech Planning (cali-tech-planning) > should extract DoD from scopes
Skill Orchestration > Plannotator Gate Flow > should create approval receipt after gate
Skill Orchestration > Plannotator Gate Flow > should stamp approved flag in spec
Skill Orchestration > Plannotator Gate Flow > should validate workflow status after gate
Skill Orchestration > Skill Chaining > should flow Shape Up → Gate → Tech Planning
Skill Orchestration > Skill Chaining > should flow Interface → Gate → Selection
Skill Orchestration > Artifact Path Generation > should generate correct spec path
Skill Orchestration > Artifact Path Generation > should generate correct interfaces path
Skill Orchestration > Artifact Path Generation > should generate correct tech plan path
Skill Orchestration > Artifact Path Generation > should increment version numbers
Workflow Start (pi-test-harness) > should create index.json when workflow starts
Phase Advancement (pi-test-harness) > should handle /pw:next command
Phase Advancement (pi-test-harness) > should call plannotator gate after Critique
Tool Calls (pi-test-harness) > should call subagent for parallel work
Tool Calls (pi-test-harness) > should use ask patterns for clarifications
Error Handling (pi-test-harness) > should handle missing workflow gracefully
Error Handling (pi-test-harness) > should validate phase transitions
pi-test-harness Availability > should detect if harness is available
pi-test-harness Availability > should have harness module structure
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Creation > should create workflow directory structure
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Creation > should create index.json with correct structure
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Creation > should add workflow to tracking.json
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Creation > should support multiple workflows in tracking
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Rename > should update workflow name in index.json
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Rename > should update workflow name in tracking.json
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Rename > should preserve dirHash after rename
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Rename > should handle name with special characters
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Archive > should update workflow status to archived
Workflow Lifecycle > Workflow Archive > should preserve archived workflow data
Workflow Lifecycle > Cross-Session Persistence > should persist workflow between sessions
Workflow Lifecycle > Cross-Session Persistence > should handle concurrent workflow modifications
Workflow Lifecycle > Artifact Creation > should create spec artifact
Workflow Lifecycle > Artifact Creation > should track artifact in index.json
Golden Dataset Overview > should have 5 test cases
Golden Dataset Overview > should cover all categories
Golden Dataset Overview > each case should have required fields
SKILL.md Golden Validation > should have validation results for all cases
SKILL.md Golden Validation > Shape Up Full Workflow > should have phases, gates, and artifacts documented
SKILL.md Golden Validation > Shape Up With Interface > should have interface phases and gate
SKILL.md Golden Validation > Overall Validation > should have correct phase documentation
Phase Extraction > should extract phases from SKILL.md
Phase Extraction > should have Setup as first phase
Phase Extraction > should have Execution as last phase
Phase Extraction > should have Planning phase
Tool References > should reference pi-tools directory
Tool References > should reference subagent tool
Tool References > should reference ask_user_question tool
Tool References > should reference plannotator tool
Gate Validation > should have plannotator gates with --gate
Gate Validation > should document gates as mandatory or important
Gate Validation > Gate Phase Documentation > should document Review Gate for Phase 5
Gate Validation > Gate Phase Documentation > should document Tech Planning gate
Artifact Documentation > should document spec-product.md
Artifact Documentation > should document spec-tech.md
Artifact Documentation > should document interfaces.md
Artifact Documentation > should document index.json
Workflow Flow > should document auto-chaining rules
Workflow Flow > should document execution is automatic
Workflow Flow > should have CRITICAL RULES section
Workflow Flow > should document workflow directory structure
Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: shape-up-full-workflow > should have expected phases in SKILL.md
Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: shape-up-full-workflow > should reference expected tools
Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: shape-up-full-workflow > should document required artifacts
Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: shape-up-full-workflow > should have gate documentation for gated workflows
Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: shape-up-with-interface > should have expected phases in SKILL.md
Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: shape-up-with-interface > should reference expected tools
Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: shape-up-with-interface > should document required artifacts
Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: shape-up-with-interface > should have gate documentation for gated workflows

Per-Case Basic Validation > Case: error-recovery > should have gate documentation for gated workflows
Validation Summary > should generate valid summary
Validation Summary > should have correct phase documentation
Pattern Consistency > should use consistent tool naming
Pattern Consistency > should reference tools via pi-tools
Pattern Consistency > should have consistent section headers
Edge Case Coverage > should handle shape-up full workflow
Edge Case Coverage > should handle shape-up with interface
Edge Case Coverage > should handle quick execution
Edge Case Coverage > should have error recovery case
REAL State Functions > readTracking / writeTracking > readTracking returns null when tracking does not exist
REAL State Functions > readTracking / writeTracking > readTracking reads what writeTracking wrote
REAL State Functions > readTracking / writeTracking > writeTracking persists data across calls
REAL State Functions > readTracking / writeTracking > handles empty workflows array
REAL State Functions > getActiveWorkflow > returns null when no workflows
REAL State Functions > getActiveWorkflow > returns the in-progress workflow
REAL State Functions > getActiveWorkflow > returns null when no in-progress workflow
REAL State Functions > getActiveWorkflow > returns first in-progress when multiple
REAL State Functions > getAllActiveWorkflows > returns empty when no workflows
REAL State Functions > getAllActiveWorkflows > returns all in-progress workflows
REAL State Functions > renameWorkflow > renames existing workflow
REAL State Functions > renameWorkflow > fails when workflow not found
REAL State Functions > renameWorkflow > fails with short name
REAL State Functions > reconcileTracking > detects workflows on disk not in tracking
REAL State Functions > archiveWorkflowOnDisk > archives workflow in index.json
REAL State Functions > archiveWorkflowOnDisk > returns false when workflow not found
REAL State Functions > archiveWorkflowOnDisk > returns false when no workflows directory exists
REAL State Functions > archiveWorkflowOnDisk > updates only target workflow in date directory
REAL State Functions > parseInputForWorkflow > extracts file references
REAL State Functions > parseInputForWorkflow > extracts text without file references
REAL State Functions > parseInputForWorkflow > handles empty input
REAL State Functions > Utility Functions > generateDirHash creates pw- prefixed hash
REAL State Functions > Utility Functions > hashToWorkflowId extracts last segment of hash
REAL State Functions > Utility Functions > toSafeName converts to lowercase with dashes
REAL State Functions > Utility Functions > getDateStamp returns ISO date
REAL State Functions > Utility Functions > suggestNameFromDraft extracts keywords
